channel.title: BIA on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in BIA on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Program Management and Oversight
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Governance" , "Risk Management" , "Compliance" , "Audits" , "Security Awareness" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Third-Party Risk" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security program management and oversight for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn governance, risk management, third-party risk, compliance, audits, and security awareness.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Security and Risk Management
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Security Management" , "Risk Management" , "Security Governance" , "Compliance" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Supply Chain Risk" , "Security Policy" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Security and Risk Management for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn professional ethics, security concepts, governance, compliance, risk management, supply chain risk, and awareness.
